author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Proposed Phase 9 roadmap: P0 = CubeCL + AMD GPU (WGPU + ROCm), P1 = ferrotorch-train + fusion + LLM modules + quantization, P2 = gradient accumulation + more activations/losses + Muon optimizer. CubeCL is the highest-leverage single change — unlocks 5 GPU backends from one codebase.
